g.text: Rollback Journal File Format — Structure Layout
0x14 | 4 B | Page Size | DB page size (e.g. 4096)
3 | Word Loop | Iterate 4-byte words in page
0x20 | 4096 B | Original Page | Data before modification
0x1024 | 4 B | Page Number | Next modified index
0x1028 | 4096 B | Original Page | Data before modification
3 | fsync journal | MUST complete before step 4
4 | Modify DB Pages | Journal covers undo path
